items.title_en: Goodbye Visa and Mastercard: 130M Europeans switching to sovereign payment
items.title_zh: 再见 Visa 与 Mastercard：1.3亿欧洲人转向主权支付
items.summary_en: Europe appears set to shift away from Visa and Mastercard toward a sovereign payments framework, with an estimated 130 million Europeans expected to adopt the new rails by 2026. The move signals a push for digital sovereignty and domestic payment infrastructure to reduce dependence on US-based networks, with implications for banks, fintechs, and merchants. It could redefine the balance of power in European payments.
items.summary_zh: 欧洲似乎将摆脱 Visa 与 Mastercard，转向主权支付体系，预计到2026年将有约1.3亿 Europeans 采用新支付通道。这一举措标志着对数字主权和本地支付基础设施的推进，旨在降低对美国网络的依赖，并可能改变银行、金融科技公司和商户在欧洲支付领域的格局。

items.title_en: Meta blocks human rights accounts from reaching audiences in Arabia and the UAE
items.title_zh: Meta 限制在人权相关账户在阿联酋与沙特等地区触达受众
items.summary_en: Meta has restricted the reach of human rights-related accounts in Saudi Arabia and the UAE, limiting their ability to reach local audiences. The move raises concerns about censorship and safety for advocates operating under restrictive regimes, and could reshape NGO communication strategies on major platforms. This exemplifies how platform policies can influence discourse in geopolitically sensitive markets.
items.summary_zh: Meta 限制在人权相关账户在沙特阿拉伯和阿联酋的受众覆盖，削弱其触达当地受众的能力。此举引发对在限制性政权下倡导者安全与言论自由的担忧，并可能改变非政府组织在主流平台上的传播策略，体现了平台政策对地缘政治敏感市场话语的影响。

items.title_en: Victory: Tennessee man jailed 37 days for Trump meme wins $835,000 settlement
items.title_zh: 田纳西男子因特朗普梗被关押37天获835,000美元和解
items.summary_en: A Tennessee man jailed for 37 days over a Trump meme reached an $835k settlement, highlighting civil-liberties concerns around satirical content and policing. The case spotlights the risk of overreach and the value of pursuing legal remedies to protect First Amendment rights.
items.summary_zh: 田纳西一名男子因一则特朗普梗被关押37天，最终和解金额为835,000美元，凸显对讽刺性言论与执法过度的公民自由担忧。此案强调追求法律救济以维护第一修正案权利的重要性。

items.title_en: College students drown out AI-praising commencement speeches with boos
items.title_zh: 大学生用嘘声抵制AI吹捧的毕业致辞
items.summary_en: College students boo AI-promoting commencement speeches, signaling skepticism about hype surrounding AI's role in society. The backlash suggests audiences want more pragmatic, nuanced discussions rather than glänzende hype, even at ceremonial events. It reflects ongoing tensions between academia and industry narratives about AI.
items.summary_zh: 大学生在对AI吹捧的毕业致辞中发出嘘声，表明对AI在社会角色的热炒持怀疑态度。此举表明观众更期待务实、细致的讨论，而非在仪式场合中的过度炒作，反映出学术界与产业对AI叙事的张力。

items.title_en: Apparently Google hates us now
items.title_zh: 显然 Google 现在讨厌我们
items.summary_en: A provocative take on recent Google moves that frustrated developers and creators, criticizing platform policies or product changes and outlining the consequences for open ecosystems. It argues for more transparency and better developer relations.
items.summary_zh: 对 Google 最近举措引发开发者不满的观点性文章，批评其平台策略或产品变动对开放生态的影响，讨论透明度不足和开发者关系的后果。

items.title_en: Qwen3.7-Max: The Agent Frontier
items.title_zh: Qwen3.7-Max：代理能力的前沿
items.summary_en: Qwen3.7-Max expands the AI frontier by enabling agent-like capabilities that can reason, plan, and act with external tools. This pushes toward more autonomous AI systems that can complete multi-step tasks with less human guidance. For developers, it offers a path to building more capable, real-world automation and assistants.
items.summary_zh: Qwen3.7-Max 通过提供类代理的能力，能进行推理、规划并调用外部工具执行任务，进一步推动更具自主性的AI系统发展。它使多步任务的自动化实现变得更加可行，开发者可以借此构建更强的现实世界应用与助手。

items.title_en: Anna's Archive Hit with $19.5M Default Judgment and Global Domain Takedown Order
items.title_zh: Anna's Archive 遭遇 1950 万美元默认判决与全球域名封禁令
items.summary_en: Anna's Archive faced a $19.5M default judgment and a global domain takedown order, illustrating the legal crackdown on piracy-hosting platforms. The episode underscores the tension between open access and copyright enforcement online.
items.summary_zh: Anna's Archive 遭遇 1950 万美元的默认判决以及全球域名封禁令，显示了对盗版托管平台的法律压制。此事凸显了开放获取与版权执法之间的矛盾。

items.title_en: Map of Metal
items.title_zh: 金属地图
items.summary_en: Map of Metal provides a global, interactive view of critical metals across supply chains, helping engineers and policymakers spot bottlenecks from mining to manufacturing. The project emphasizes supply chain transparency and material substitution as key levers for resilience in tech hardware.
items.summary_zh: 金属地图提供全球关键金属供应链的互动视图，帮助工程师和决策者识别从矿产到制造环节的瓶颈。该项目凸显供应链透明度与材料替代在科技硬件韧性中的关键作用。

items.title_en: Saying Goodbye to Asm.js
items.title_zh: 告别 asm.js
items.summary_en: Asm.js, once a performance-boosting subset of JavaScript, is being phased out in favor of WebAssembly. The move reflects the industry shift toward a standardized, near-native execution model and carries implications for legacy projects and tooling. Developers should plan migrations to WebAssembly and update pipelines accordingly.
items.summary_zh: asm.js 作为 JavaScript 的老旧子集正逐步被淘汰，WebAssembly 成为近似原生执行的标准。此举反映了行业向统一高效执行模型的转变，并影响遗留项目与开发流程。开发者应规划迁移至 WebAssembly，并更新构建与工具链。

items.title_en: Everything in C is undefined behavior
items.title_zh: C 语言中的一切都是未定义行为
items.summary_en: The post argues that C's undefined behavior is pervasive, undermining safety and portability. It explains risk examples and why developers should write safer code or adopt safer languages and tooling.
items.summary_zh: 博文指出，C 语言中的未定义行为无处不在，严重影响安全性和可移植性。文章通过实例说明 UB 的风险，建议开发者采用更严格的写法或转向更安全的语言与工具来降低风险。

items.title_en: OpenAI Is Preparing to File for an IPO Soon
items.title_zh: OpenAI 即将提交 IPO
items.summary_en: WSJ reports OpenAI preparing to file for an IPO soon, signaling a shift toward public markets despite its private funding model. Implications include governance considerations, investor expectations, and competitive dynamics with peers.
items.summary_zh: 据华尔街日报报道，OpenAI 正在筹备很快提交首次公开募股，标志着在私有资金模式下向公开市场迈进。对治理、投资者期望以及与同行的竞争格局将产生影响。

items.title_en: I’ve joined Anthropic
items.title_zh: 我已加入 Anthropic
items.summary_en: Renowned AI researcher Andrej Karpathy announces joining Anthropic, signaling a strengthening push toward safety and alignment work at the company. The move highlights ongoing talent shifts among leading AI labs and could influence future research directions.
items.summary_zh: 知名 AI 研究者安德烈·卡帕蒂宣布加入 Anthropic，表明公司在安全与对齐方向的投入在加大。此举反映出顶尖 AI 研究机构之间的人才流动，并可能影响未来的研究方向。

items.title_en: America's Greatest Strategic Blunder: The Imprisonment of Qian Xuesen
items.title_zh: 钱学森被囚禁：美国最大的战略错误
items.summary_en: The piece argues that imprisoning Qian Xuesen during the Cold War was a strategic misstep that delayed collaboration with a key aerospace talent and influenced tech leadership pole shifts. It frames the episode within policy decisions shaping tech power.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为在冷战时期对钱学森的监禁是美国的重大战略错误，错失与这位关键航天人才的合作机会，从而影响科技力量的领先格局。将此事件置于影响科技实力的政策议程中。

items.title_en: SBCL: The Assembly Code Breadboard (2014)
items.title_zh: SBCL：汇编代码的面包板（2014）
items.summary_en: The piece positions SBCL as a practical playground for low-level experimentation inside a high-level Lisp system. It argues that Lisp macros and SBCL's runtime make it easy to prototype and benchmark tiny assembly ideas without sacrificing safety. It's a reminder of how language ecosystems can accelerate systems tinkering.
items.summary_zh: 本文把 SBCL 当作在高阶 Lisp 环境中进行底层实验的实用面包板，强调 Lisp 宏与 SBCL 运行时能在不牺牲安全性的前提下快速原型化和基准测试汇编思路。这也提醒读者，语言生态可以加速系统层面的试验。

items.title_en: GitHub is investigating unauthorized access to their internal repositories
items.title_zh: GitHub 正在调查对内部仓库的未经授权访问
items.summary_en: GitHub is investigating unauthorized access to its internal repositories, with potential exposure of sensitive code. The incident emphasizes ongoing security vigilance and the need for strong access controls and routine secret rotation.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 正在调查对内部仓库的未经授权访问，可能暴露敏感代码。此事凸显持续的安全警戒需求以及强化访问控制与密钥轮换的必要性。

items.title_en: Google's AI is being manipulated. The search giant is quietly fighting back
items.title_zh: 谷歌的 AI 正在被操控，搜索巨头悄然反击
items.summary_en: The article reports ongoing attempts to manipulate Google's AI-powered search results and describes how Google is quietly defending against manipulation with model hardening, policy updates, and improved signals. It underlines the fragility of search integrity in the age of AI.
items.summary_zh: 文章报道有针对 Google AI 搜索结果的操控尝试，描述了 Google 如何通过模型加强、策略更新和信号改进等方式进行防御。强调在 AI 时代，搜索结果的完整性更容易受到影响。

items.title_en: Gemini 3.5 Flash
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.5 闪速版
items.summary_en: Google unveils Gemini 3.5 Flash, a speed-optimized variant in the Gemini family aimed at faster inference and snappier tool use in real-world apps. The update underscores Google's push to edge AI speed and integration, signaling that latency remains a key performance lever even as models grow larger.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌推出 Gemini 3.5 闪速版，聚焦推理速度与工具使用体验的优化。此举凸显谷歌在提升 AI 响应性和系统集成方面的持续投入，说明在大模型时代，延迟仍是重要的性能指标。

items.title_en: Incident Report: Railway Blocked by Google Cloud (Resolved)
items.title_zh: 铁路因 Google Cloud 阻塞
items.summary_en: A Google Cloud outage temporarily blocks Railway's platform, disrupting deployments and status visibility for users relying on their hosting services. This incident underscores how dependent development tools and infrastructure are on cloud providers, highlighting the need for resilience strategies like multi-cloud or regional failovers.
items.summary_zh: Google Cloud 的故障暂时阻塞了 Railway 平台，影响使用其托管服务的开发者的部署和状态查询。此事件凸显了开发工具和基础设施对云服务的高度依赖，强调需要通过多云或区域性故障转移等方式提升韧性。

items.title_en: Google I/O 2026 had nothing to say and said it badly ahead of Apple's WWDC
items.title_zh: Google I/O 2026：空谈连连，先于 WWDC 的表现令人失望
items.summary_en: Crtiques Google I/O 2026 for offering few substantial announcements and a lackluster pre-WWDC showing, signaling missed opportunities in AI tooling, developer platforms, and platform strategy ahead of Apple's keynote. It contrasts with expectations for rival ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 评析指出 Google I/O 2026 缺乏实质性新内容，且在苹果 WWDC 之前的表现令人失望，暗示在 AI 工具、开发者平台和生态策略方面错失机会，与苹果生态形成对比。

items.title_en: Minnesota becomes first state to ban prediction markets
items.title_zh: 明尼苏达成为首个禁止预测市场的州
items.summary_en: Minnesota becomes the first state to ban prediction markets, raising questions about regulation of forecasting tools and their use in economics, research, and AI-enabled decision making. The move may inspire other states to reconsider such markets.
items.summary_zh: 明尼苏达成为首个禁止预测市场的州，引发对预测工具在经济研究和 AI 驱动决策中的监管问题的讨论。此举可能促使其他州重新评估此类市场。

items.title_en: I’ve built a virtual museum with nearly every operating system you can think of
items.title_zh: 我用几乎所有你能想到的操作系统搭建了一个虚拟博物馆
items.summary_en: A personal project curates a virtual museum of operating systems across history, spanning from legacy to modern platforms. It combines emulation, demos, and documentation to preserve software heritage and let readers compare how OS design evolved.
items.summary_zh: 一个个人项目把各式各样的操作系统整理成一个虚拟博物馆。它通过仿真、演示和文档，帮助保存软件历史并让用户比较不同操作系统的设计演进。

items.title_en: Testing distributed systems with AI agents
items.title_zh: 用 AI 代理人测试分布式系统
items.summary_en: A project exploring using AI agents to stress-test distributed systems, generate fault scenarios, and monitor observability. It demonstrates how AI can automate test case discovery and accelerate reliability improvements, while raising questions about reproducibility and trust in AI-driven tests.
items.summary_zh: 该项目探索利用 AI 代理人对分布式系统进行压力测试、场景生成和可观测性检查，展示 AI 在自动化测试用例发现与提升可靠性方面的潜力，同时也提出可重复性与信任问题。

items.title_en: Learnings from 100K lines of Rust with AI (2025)
items.title_zh: AI 助手下的 Rust 代码：100K 行的经验教训
items.summary_en: Lessons from writing 100k lines of Rust with AI assistance, covering design choices, testing strategies, and maintainability when tooling and code generation play a larger role. It reflects on how AI copilots shape Rust development.
items.summary_zh: 总结在 AI 助力下编写 10 万行 Rust 代码的经验教训，涵盖设计选择、测试策略与可维护性，并讨论 AI 助手如何影响 Rust 开发节奏与代码质量。

items.title_en: Google changes its search box
items.title_zh: 谷歌改造搜索框
items.summary_en: Google previews a redesigned search box at IO 2026, signaling a shift toward faster input, cleaner UX, and deeper AI-assisted results. The move could reshape how users interact with search and how developers build on top of Google's search features.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌在 IO 2026 展示了重新设计的搜索框，标志着在更快输入、简洁用户体验和更深的 AI 辅助结果方面的改进。此举可能改变用户与搜索的互动方式，也影响开发者在谷歌搜索生态上的构建。

items.title_en: Stable Audio 3
items.title_zh: 稳定音频3
items.summary_en: Stable Audio 3 presents advances in diffusion-based audio synthesis, enabling high-fidelity, controllable sound generation. The work discusses architectural improvements, data considerations, and trade-offs between quality and latency.
items.summary_zh: Stable Audio 3 在基于扩散的音频合成方面取得进展，使高保真、可控的音频生成成为可能。文中介绍了模型架构、数据选择以及质量与延迟之间的权衡。

items.title_en: FiveThirtyEight articles on the Internet Archive
items.title_zh: FiveThirtyEight 的文章被放进互联网档案馆
items.summary_en: FiveThirtyEight articles are being archived by the Internet Archive, ensuring long-term access even if the original site changes. This supports reproducibility and historical analysis in data journalism, while raising questions about licensing and reuse.
items.summary_zh: FiveThirtyEight 的文章被互联网档案馆长期存档，即使原站点发生变化也能访问。这有助于数据新闻的可复现性与历史分析，同时引发关于许可与再利用的讨论。

items.title_en: Formal Verification Gates for AI Coding Loops
items.title_zh: AI 编码循环的形式化验证
items.summary_en: The post advocates applying formal verification techniques to AI coding loops to ensure safety and correctness in iterative AI reasoning. It suggests structural approaches to bound behavior and improve reliability in long-running agent systems.
items.summary_zh: 文中主张把形式化验证方法应用于 AI 编码循环，以保障迭代式 AI 推理的安全性与正确性。提出通过结构性方法约束行为、提升长期代理系统的可靠性。

items.title_en: Japan is gripped by mass allergies. A 1950s project is to blame
items.title_zh: 日本大规模花粉过敏归咎于1950年代的一项计划
items.summary_en: Decades-old project in the 1950s is linked to today's mass allergy problem in Japan. The article traces how early experiments altered pollen ecosystems or health outcomes and why legacy decisions matter for science policy and public health. It highlights how long tail effects from past research can shape present-day living conditions.
items.summary_zh: 日本因1950年代的一项研究计划而引发的花粉过敏问题在今日仍有显著影响。文章追溯早期实验如何改变花粉生态或健康结果，以及历史决策对科学政策和公共卫生的意义，强调过去研究的长期影响会塑造当下的生活环境。

items.title_en: Remove-AI-Watermarks – CLI and library for removing AI watermarks from images
items.title_zh: Remove–AI–Watermarks：用于从图像移除 AI 水印的 CLI 与库
items.summary_en: Open-source CLI and library that remove AI-generated watermarks from images. While useful for legitimate image editing, it raises ethical questions about watermarking, ownership, and the potential for misuse in denying AI authorship claims.
items.summary_zh: 一个开源命令行工具与库，能够从图像中移除 AI 水印。该工具在合法编辑场景有用，但也引发关于水印、所有权及滥用风险的伦理讨论。

items.title_en: Apple unveils new accessibility features
items.title_zh: 苹果推出全新无障碍功能
items.summary_en: Apple rolls out a set of accessibility features powered by Apple Intelligence, including on-device improvements to screen readers and real-time captions, plus personalized UI tweaks. The update underscores how AI-enabled tools can make devices more usable for a broad range of people.
items.summary_zh: 苹果公布一系列无障碍新功能，由 Apple Intelligence 提供支持，包括对屏幕阅读、实时字幕等的改进，以及更贴合用户需求的个性化界面。此举凸显了 AI 驱动工具在提升无障碍设计方面的潜力。

items.title_en: Infomaniak transitions to a foundation model to protect user data privacy
items.title_zh: Infomaniak 转向基础模型以保护用户数据隐私
items.summary_en: Infomaniak is adopting a foundation model approach to protect user data privacy. By housing the model stack in its sovereign cloud and tightening data handling controls, the company aims to minimize data exposure and improve user control over AI processing. The move highlights a growing trend of privacy-conscious providers considering foundation models as a way to balance AI usefulness with data governance.
items.summary_zh: Infomaniak 正在采用基础模型策略以提升数据隐私保护。通过将模型堆栈置于自有 souverign 云并强化数据处理控制，该公司旨在降低数据暴露风险并提高用户对 AI 处理的掌控感。这一举措反映出隐私导向的云服务商开始将基础模型用于在确保数据治理的同时发挥 AI 作用。

items.title_en: Disney erased FiveThirtyEight
items.title_zh: 迪士尼抹去 FiveThirtyEight
items.summary_en: Disney reportedly erased FiveThirtyEight from its slate, reflecting a corporate reorganization that sidelines a once-prominent data journalism brand. The move underscores how ownership changes can affect independent analytics reach and public trust.
items.summary_zh: 迪士尼据称已从自有资产中移除 FiveThirtyEight，反映出企业在数据新闻品牌上的策略调整。此举凸显所有权变动如何影响独立分析与公众信任的传播范围。

items.title_en: Show HN: Forge – Guardrails take an 8B model from 53% to 99% on agentic tasks
items.title_zh: Forge：Guardrails 将 8B 模型在代理任务上的表现从 53% 提升到 99%
items.summary_en: Forge demonstrates guardrails that lift an 8B-parameter model's performance on agentic tasks from 53% to 99%, illustrating how safety-oriented constraints can dramatically improve reliability in autonomous agents. The result highlights practical gains from architecture and policy design.
items.summary_zh: Forge 展示通过 Guardrails 将一个 8B 参数模型在代理任务上的表现从 53% 提升到 99%，说明以安全约束为导向的设计能显著提升自动代理的可靠性。结果凸显了架构与策略设计的实际收益。

items.title_en: OpenAI Adopts Google's SynthID Watermark for AI Images with Verification Tool
items.title_zh: OpenAI 采用 Google 的 SynthID 图像水印并提供验证工具
items.summary_en: OpenAI integrates Google's SynthID watermark into AI-generated images and ships a verification tool to prove AI origin. This marks a shift toward verifiable content provenance and could influence platform policies, authentication tooling, and public trust in AI-generated media.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 将 Google 的 SynthID 图像水印嵌入 AI 生成的图像，并提供验证工具以证明来源。这标志着对内容可验证出处的重视，有望影响平台策略、认证工具和公众对 AI 生成媒体的信任。

items.title_en: Gemini CLI will stop working from June 18, 2026
items.title_zh: Gemini CLI 将于 2026 年 6 月 18 日停止工作
items.summary_en: Google announces the Gemini CLI will stop working on a set date, with migration to the Antigravity CLI recommended. It underscores rapid churn in AI tooling ecosystems and the importance of migration planning for automation workflows.
items.summary_zh: Google 宣布 Gemini CLI 将在指定日期停止工作，并建议迁移到 Antigravity CLI。此举显示了 AI 工具生态的快速迭代与迁移规划对自动化工作流的重要性。

items.title_en: Mistral AI acquires Emmi AI
items.title_zh: Mistral AI 收购 Emmi AI 打造领先的 AI 技术栈
items.summary_en: Mistral AI acquires Emmi AI to assemble an end-to-end AI stack, combining models, tooling, and deployment capabilities to accelerate product development and enterprise use. The acquisition signals consolidation in the AI tooling ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Mistral AI 收购 Emmi AI，意在打造端到端的 AI 技术栈，整合模型、工具与部署能力，加速产品开发与企业落地。此举标志着 AI 工具生态的整合加速。

items.title_en: No way to parse integers in C (2022)
items.title_zh: C 语言中解析整数无从下手（2022）
items.summary_en: The post argues that C lacks a robust, safe integer parsing API, exposing overflow, error handling, and UB risks. It discusses workarounds and potential safer library patterns to adopt.
items.summary_zh: 文中指出 C 语言缺乏健壮、可安全解析整数的 API，存在溢出、错误处理及未定义行为等风险，提出替代方案与更安全的库模式。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gaussian Splat of a Strawberry
items.title_zh: 草莓的高斯斑点渲染
items.summary_en: The project showcases a Gaussian splat rendering of a strawberry, producing soft volumetric shading from a point-based approach. It illustrates how advanced rendering techniques are being used in art and experiments, signaling future directions for real-time graphics pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 该作品以草莓为例，展示高斯斑点渲染技术，利用点云实现柔和体积光照与纹理效果。它体现了前沿渲染技术在艺术创作中的应用趋势，以及对实时图形管线的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Gemini Omni
items.title_zh: Gemini Omni
items.summary_en: Gemini Omni is a versatile, cross-domain model that unifies tools, reasoning, and multi-modal inputs, signaling Google’s effort to provide a single powerful AI assistant across tasks. It emphasizes memory, tool use, and cross-domain capabilities.
items.summary_zh: Gemini Omni 是一个多模态、多领域的通用模型，整合工具、推理与多模态输入，体现谷歌在打造全栈 AI 助手上的努力。它强调记忆、工具使用和跨领域能力。

items.title_en: OpenBSD 7.9
items.title_zh: OpenBSD 7.9 发布
items.summary_en: OpenBSD 7.9 ships with improved security hardening, updated drivers, and new ports, continuing the project's emphasis on correctness and minimalism. The release also expands platform support and performance improvements.
items.summary_zh: OpenBSD 7.9 发布，带来更强的安全强化、更新的驱动以及新端口，延续对正确性与简约设计的坚持。此次版本还扩展了平台支持并带来性能提升。

items.title_en: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on GitHub
items.title_zh: CISA 管理员在 GitHub 上泄露 AWS GovCloud 密钥
items.summary_en: A CISA administrator exposed GovCloud access keys on GitHub, underscoring how careless secret management can create cloud security risks. The incident highlights the need for secret rotation and stricter repository hygiene.
items.summary_zh: CISA 一名管理员在 GitHub 上暴露 GovCloud 访问密钥，凸显秘密管理不小心带来的云安全风险。事件强调需要密钥轮换和更严格的仓库治理。

items.title_en: Wi-Wi Is Wireless Time Sync at 1 Nanosecond
items.title_zh: Wi-Wi 无线时间同步：1 纳秒级
items.summary_en: Wi-Wi enables wireless time synchronization with sub-nanosecond accuracy, enabling precise coordination across distributed systems without dedicated wired clocks. It discusses potential applications in data centers, robotics, and HPC, along with calibration and stability considerations.
items.summary_zh: Wi-Wi 实现无线时间同步，精度达到亚纳秒级，可在分布式系统间实现无需有线时钟的高精度协同。讨论在数据中心、机器人和高性能计算等领域的应用及标定与稳定性挑战。

items.title_en: Dumb ways for an open source project to die
items.title_zh: 让开源项目死去的愚蠢之道
items.summary_en: An essay outlining common missteps that doom open-source projects—opaque governance, dwindling maintainer energy, and misaligned incentives. It offers practical reminders for maintainers and communities to design sustainable processes and governance to avoid burnout and abandonment.
items.summary_zh: 文章列出导致开源项目夭折的常见误区，如治理不清、维护者热情衰退、激励错位等，并给维护者与社区提出可执行的可持续治理建议，帮助避免倦怠与放弃。

items.title_en: There's no earthly way of knowing which direction we are going
items.title_zh: 没有人知道我们将走向哪个方向
items.summary_en: An reflective piece pondering uncertainty about the tech industry’s trajectory, citing uncertainty in AI, hardware, and policy. It argues for adaptable thinking and plural paths forward.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇关于科技行业未来方向不确定性的反思，讨论 AI、硬件与政策等因素的未知走向。主张采用更具适应性的思维和多元化的发展路径。

items.title_en: Why is almost everyone right-handed? A new study connects it to bipedalism
items.title_zh: 几乎所有人都用右手？新研究把这一现象与直立行走的演化联系起来
items.summary_en: A new study links right-handedness to the evolution of bipedalism, suggesting brain lateralization and motor control co-evolved with walking on two legs. The finding adds a biological lens to everyday human behavior.
items.summary_zh: 一项新研究将右利手现象与直立行走的演化联系起来，暗示大脑半球化与运动控制在双足行走中共同演化。该发现为日常行为提供了新的生物学视角。

items.title_en: Copy Fail, Dirty Frag, and Fragnesia kernel vulnerabilities
items.title_zh: Gentoo 新闻：Copy-Fail、Dirty Frag 与 Fragnesia 内核漏洞
items.summary_en: Gentoo Linux warns of multiple kernel vulnerabilities nicknamed Copy-Fail, Dirty Frag, and Fragnesia. Users should apply patches and upgrade affected kernels to mitigate potential exploits.
items.summary_zh: Gentoo Linux 发布关于 Copy-Fail、Dirty Frag 与 Fragnesia 等多项内核漏洞的通告。用户应尽快应用补丁并升级受影响的内核，以降低被利用的风险。

items.title_en: The TTY Demystified (2008)
items.title_zh: TTY 的由来与工作原理详解（2008）
items.summary_en: A primer on TTY concepts, including line discipline and canonical vs noncanonical IO, and their relevance to modern shells and editors. It helps readers understand low-level I/O shaping practical tooling and user interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 对 TTY 的基本概念进行入门讲解，包括行控制、规范输入输出等，以及它们在现代 shell 与编辑器设计中的作用，帮助读者理解底层 I/O 如何影响实际工具与用户界面。

items.title_en: HTML-in-Canvas Demos
items.title_zh: Canvas 中的 HTML 演示
items.summary_en: Collection of demos showcasing HTML content rendered or integrated within a canvas-based context, exploring creative UI, interaction, and performance considerations.
items.summary_zh: 一组展示在画布环境中呈现或嵌入 HTML 内容的示例，探讨在 Canvas 场景下实现创意用户界面、交互和性能要点。

items.title_en: C++26: More Function Wrappers
items.title_zh: C++26：更多函数封装器
items.summary_en: Explores new function wrapping capabilities in C++26, including copyable function wrappers and improved callable interfaces, with guidance on when and how to use wrappers for generic programming and callbacks.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 C++26 新增的函数封装能力，包括可拷贝的函数包装器和改进的可调用接口，并给出在泛型编程与回调场景中使用封装器的建议。

items.title_en: Show HN: Superlog (YC P26) – Observability that installs itself and fixes bugs
items.title_zh: Show HN：Superlog（YC P26）—— 自动安装的可观测性工具，能修复 Bug
items.summary_en: Show HN presents Superlog, an observability tool that purportedly installs itself and can auto-fix bugs. The project aims to reduce developer toil by providing turnkey instrumentation and remediation guidance.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍了 Superlog，这是一个自带安装的可观测性工具，声称能自动修复 Bug。该项目旨在通过一键化的观测与修复建议，降低开发者的工作负担。

items.title_en: Testing MiniMax M2.7 via API on three real ML and coding workflows
items.title_zh: 通过 API 在三个真实 ML 与编码工作流上测试 MiniMax M2.7
items.summary_en: Testing MiniMax M2.7 through APIs across three real ML and coding workflows evaluates practical performance, latency, and integration friction. The results help practitioners judge whether this device or library fits their production pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 通过 API 在三个真实的机器学习与编码工作流中测试 MiniMax M2.7，评估其实践中的性能、延迟与集成难度。测试结果为开发者决定是否将其纳入生产流程提供参考。

items.title_en: AI, "Humanity", and Dr. Manhattan Syndrome: A Communications Intervention
items.title_zh: AI、‘人性’与 Dr. Manhattan综合征：一种传播干预
items.summary_en: An analysis of how AI and the rhetoric of humanity can shape public discourse, invoking a ‘Dr. Manhattan’ syndrome. It proposes interventions to calibrate AI storytelling and manage expectations around intelligence and agency.
items.summary_zh: 分析人工智能对“人性”叙事的影响及其对公众话语的影响，借用 Dr. Manhattan 综合征的隐喻。提出通过传播干预来校准 AI 叙事与对智能与自主性的期待。

items.title_en: CopyFail: From Pod to Host
items.title_zh: CopyFail：从 Pod 到 Host
items.summary_en: CopyFail delves into the pitfalls of copying data from a Kubernetes pod to the host. It explains frequent failure modes and practical remedies—covering permissions, mount configurations, and timing—aimed at making container-to-host data transfers more dependable.
items.summary_zh: CopyFail 深入讲解在 Kubernetes 中从 Pod 复制数据到宿主机时常见的失败原因及对策，涵盖权限、挂载配置与时序等问题。给出可操作的修复思路，帮助开发者让容器与宿主机之间的数据传输更可靠。

items.title_en: Hanoi’s humble beer glass and the memory of a nation
items.title_zh: 河内的朴素啤酒杯与民族记忆
items.summary_en: A longform piece uses Hanoi's humble beer glass as a lens to explore Vietnamese memory and national identity, showing how everyday objects can embody collective history.
items.summary_zh: 一篇长文以河内朴素的啤酒杯为线索，探讨越南的记忆与国家认同。日常物件如何成为集体历史的载体以及在社会记忆中的作用。

items.title_en: Fixing the Most Dangerous Dam in the World
items.title_zh: 修复世界上最危险的大坝
items.summary_en: An engineering piece discusses strategies to fix the world’s most dangerous dam, covering structural risks, monitoring approaches, and remediation methods to reduce catastrophic failure risk.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨修复世界上最危险的大坝的策略，涵盖结构风险、监测方法与治理手段，以降低灾难性崩溃的风险。

items.title_en: Polypad
items.title_zh: Polypad：在线数学绘板
items.summary_en: Polypad is an online math sandbox that lets users manipulate tiles, shapes, and equations to explore geometry and algebra interactively. It supports collaborative learning and could serve as a versatile classroom or self-study tool.
items.summary_zh: Polypad 是一个在线数学沙盒工具，提供可拖拽的磁砖、几何形状和方程等，便于师生在浏览器中进行协作式、动手式的数学探索。它体现了教育科技在浏览器端提供直观学习体验的趋势。

items.title_en: Lisp in Web-Based Applications (2001)
items.title_zh: 网页应用中的 Lisp（2001）
items.summary_en: A retrospective look at using Lisp in web apps around 2001, arguing Lisp’s expressiveness and macro system could outperform traditional web stacks in some scenarios, while practical barriers limited adoption. Provides historical context for language debates in early web development.
items.summary_zh: 回顾性论文回顾了 2001 年左右在网页应用中使用 Lisp 的情况，认为 Lisp 的表达力和宏系统在某些场景下可能优于传统网页栈，但现实障碍限制了广泛采用，为早期语言选择的讨论提供了历史视角。

items.title_en: Growing Neural Cellular Automata
items.title_zh: 成长型神经元细胞自动机
items.summary_en: Growing Neural Cellular Automata extends neural networks to control the growth of cellular automata, enabling shapes to emerge from a single cell and even exhibit self-healing. The work demonstrates robust, emergent design principles with potential implications for biology-inspired computation and scalable hardware-like systems.
items.summary_zh: 成长型神经元细胞自动机让神经网络控制细胞自动机的生长，能从单个细胞生成形状，甚至具备自我修复能力。该工作展示了可自发演化的鲁棒设计原理，对生物启发计算和可扩展的硬件式系统具有潜在影响。

items.title_en: Intro to TLA+ for the LLM Era: Prompt Your Way to Victory
items.title_zh: 面向 LLM 时代的 TLA+ 入门：通过提示取胜
items.summary_en: The piece shows how formal methods like TLA+ can be used with prompts in the LLM era to model and verify correctness properties, helping build more reliable AI-enabled systems.
items.summary_zh: 文章介绍在 LLM 时代如何把 TLA+ 等形式化方法与提示相结合，用以建模和验证正确性属性，从而提升 AI 系统的可靠性。

items.title_en: The Mercury logic programming system
items.title_zh: Mercury 逻辑编程系统
items.summary_en: Mercury is a logic programming language and environment emphasizing reliability through a strong type and mode system. It offers a modern take on logic programming with tooling geared toward both research and education.
items.summary_zh: Mercury 是一门强调通过强类型与模式系统提升可靠性的逻辑编程语言及环境。它以现代化工具链为特征，适用于研究与教学场景。

items.title_en: The AI Quant Desk for Onchain Finance
items.title_zh: 面向链上金融的 AI 量化分析台
items.summary_en: The AI Quant Desk provides portfolio analytics for on-chain finance, enabling automated strategy testing and risk assessment using on-chain data. By blending AI with blockchain signals, it aims to lower the barrier to quantitative results in DeFi and smart contract markets. The piece signals growing convergence of AI tooling with crypto-native data.
items.summary_zh: 该量化分析台为链上金融提供 AI 驱动的投资组合分析，支持基于链上数据的策略回测与风险评估。通过将 AI 与区块链信号结合，它降低了在 DeFi 与智能合约市场实现量化分析的门槛，反映出 AI 工具与加密市场数据的日益融合。

items.title_en: RISC-V and Floating-Point
items.title_zh: RISC‑V 与浮点运算
items.summary_en: RISC-V's approach to floating-point continues to shape performance and software compatibility. The piece surveys current implementations, trade-offs between compact instruction sets and FP support, and what it means for compiler, ML workloads, and hardware vendors.
items.summary_zh: RISC-V 在浮点运算实现上仍存在取舍，直接影响性能、编译器，以及生态系统的成熟度。文章梳理当前的实现状况、各方案的权衡，以及对未来硬件与软件协作的影响。

items.title_en: When Fast Fourier Transform Meets Transformer for Image Restoration (2024)
items.title_zh: FFT 与 Transformer 在图像修复中的结合（2024）
items.summary_en: Combining FFT-based processing with Transformer architectures for image restoration, this work demonstrates efficient frequency-domain techniques that complement self-attention. The result is improved restoration quality on high-resolution images with practical inference considerations.
items.summary_zh: 该工作将 FFT 处理与 Transformer 架构结合用于图像修复，展示了在频域中的高效处理如何与自注意力互补，从而在高分辨率图像上提升重建质量，并兼顾推理时的实用性。

items.title_en: In 1979 engineer Hugh Padgham discovered "gated reverb" – by accident
items.title_zh: 1979年，Hugh Padgham 意外发现了‘门控混响’
items.summary_en: A studio accident led to the creation of gated reverb, a defining 80s effect that shaped pop and rock production. The piece traces how unintended mistakes in a vocal-gating technique yielded a new tool that influenced mixing, synths, and studio workflow.
items.summary_zh: 一次录音现场的偶然失误催生了门控混响，成为80年代流行音乐的重要音效。文章回溯这一发现如何改变混音流程、合成器使用以及录音室的工作方式。

items.title_en: The two oldest printing presses
items.title_zh: 世界上最古老的两台印刷机
items.summary_en: The two oldest printing presses are preserved at the Plantin-Moretus Museum, offering tangible insight into early typography, craft, and the dissemination of knowledge.
items.summary_zh: 植物-莫雷图斯博物馆珍藏着两台最古老的印刷机，为早期字体排印、工艺与知识传播提供直观的材料证据。

items.title_en: The Invention of Buses
items.title_zh: 公交车的发明
items.summary_en: This piece traces the invention of buses, examining the social, technological, and infrastructural factors that enabled mass urban bus transit. It highlights how buses provided flexible, scalable public transportation alongside rail.
items.summary_zh: 本文梳理公交车的发明及其背后的社会、技术与基础设施因素，展示公交车如何在铁路之外成为灵活、可扩展的城市公共交通解决方案。

items.title_en: Simulated Evolution on the PICO-8
items.title_zh: 在 PICO-8 上的模拟进化
items.summary_en: Using the tiny PICO-8 fantasy console to simulate evolutionary processes, the project demonstrates how constrained hardware can still model complex systems and teach programming.
items.summary_zh: 在 PICO-8 这款极简幻想游戏机上进行的模拟进化演示，展示了在极小硬件约束下如何建模复杂系统并教授编程思维。

items.title_en: Skills in Web, iOS, and Android
items.title_zh: Web、iOS 与 Android 技能
items.summary_en: Grok skills highlight a cross-platform skillset spanning web, iOS, and Android, reflecting growth areas for developers building apps that weave native and web tech. The piece profiles what modern developers should learn to ship cohesive experiences across ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 该文章聚焦于 Web、iOS 与 Android 的跨平台技能，反映开发者在构建原生与 Web 融合应用时应掌握的关键能力。介绍当今开发者需学习的要点，以在各生态系统中交付一致的用户体验。

items.title_en: Tool mapping 90 companies in the photonics and CPO supply chain
items.title_zh: 光子学与 CPO 供应链中的 90 家公司的工具映射
items.summary_en: The piece maps tooling across 90 firms in the photonics and CPO supply chain, revealing common platforms, dependencies, and gaps. It offers insights for vendors and engineers on standardization, risk, and ecosystem health in a niche hardware domain.
items.summary_zh: 该分析对 90 家光子学与 CPO 供应链公司的工具使用情况进行了映射，揭示行业内的共用平台、依赖关系与潜在短板。为厂商与工程师在该专业硬件领域提供标准化、风险与生态健康方面的洞见。

items.title_en: Museum of Imaginary Musical Instruments
items.title_zh: 想象中的乐器博物馆
items.summary_en: Online collection of invented or fantastical musical instruments, exploring sound design, experimental interfaces, and how imagination translates into playable sound objects.
items.summary_zh: 一个在线收藏，展示虚构或幻想中的乐器，探索声音设计、实验性界面以及想象力如何转化为可演奏的声音对象。

items.title_en: Unusual uses of OEIS sequences on GitHub
items.title_zh: 在 GitHub 上 OEIS 序列的非同寻常用法
items.summary_en: GitHub projects leverage OEIS sequences in creative programming, data encoding, or puzzle-like demonstrations, showing how mathematical series inspire code and algorithm design.
items.summary_zh: 多项目在 GitHub 上巧妙地将 OEIS 序列用于创意编程、数据编码或解谜型演示，展示数学序列如何启发代码与算法设计。

items.title_en: Autoregressive next token prediction and KV Cache in transformers
items.title_zh: Transformer 的自回归下一个 token 预测与 KV 缓存
items.summary_en: Explains how autoregressive next-token prediction works in transformers and how KV caches speed up inference, memory, and generation quality. Includes practical tips on caching strategies and implementing efficient real-time generation.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Transformer 在自回归下一个 token 预测中的工作原理，以及 KV 缓存如何提升推理速度、内存占用和生成质量，给出缓存策略与实现高效实时生成的要点。

items.title_en: Nostalgic Kits Central (2024)
items.title_zh: 怀旧套件中心（2024）
items.summary_en: Nostalgic Kits Central 2024 offers a curated mix of retro-themed electronics kits, summoning memories of classic builds while teaching hands-on hardware skills. It highlights how hobbyists are blending nostalgia with modern microcontrollers, sensors, and open hardware to rekindle tinkering culture.
items.summary_zh: 2024 年版的 Nostalgic Kits Central 汇聚了以怀旧为主题的电子套件，带来经典回忆与动手技能的结合。它展示了爱好者如何把怀旧元素与现代微控制器、传感器和开源硬件结合起来，重新点燃动手创作的潮流。

items.title_en: Smartmedia Card Spec Opened, available free (2000)
items.title_zh: SmartMedia 卡接口规范公开，可免费获取（2000）
items.summary_en: The historic note explains that the SmartMedia interface spec was released into the public domain in 2000, catalyzing early flash storage devices. Open specs accelerated hardware prototyping and industry adoption.
items.summary_zh: 历史性回顾指出 SmartMedia 卡接口规范于 2000 年公开领域化，推动了早期闪存设备的发展。开放的规格加速了硬件原型设计和行业应用。

items.title_en: Handling the great code forge fragmentation
items.title_zh: 应对代码锻造平台的碎片化
items.summary_en: The piece analyzes fragmentation across code-forging ecosystems and argues for better interoperability, standard formats, and tooling. It offers guidance for developers on navigating multiple forges and migrating dependencies.
items.summary_zh: 文章分析代码锻造生态中的碎片化问题，倡导提高互操作性、标准化格式和工具链。为开发者在多平台之间管理依赖和迁移提供建议。

items.title_en: Enabling Resizable Bar on RTX 3080 Vbios via GitHub
items.title_zh: 通过 GitHub 在 RTX 3080 的 VBIOS 上启用可变尺寸显存条
items.summary_en: GitHub-based mod enables Resizable BAR on RTX 3080 by modifying VBIOS, unlocking wider memory access and potential performance gains, with caveats about warranty, stability, and driver support.
items.summary_zh: 通过 GitHub 的修改方法，在 RTX 3080 的 VBIOS 上启用可变尺寸显存条，理论上可扩大显存带宽并提升性能。此举存在保修、稳定性和驱动兼容性的潜在风险，需谨慎使用。
